title: Brainstorm: learn from SillyTavern-style entry and power-user experience
description: Use Trellis to capture a product brainstorm for FableMap entry/onboarding, newcomer roleplay literacy, scene-setting prose, long opening-scene reading, NPC-hosted first minute, character-card compatibility, and progressive power-user tooling inspired by SillyTavern and related public docs.
next_action: Open separate future tasks for owner-curated scene_digest / first_scene_opener only if Schema/API changes are approved.
Open a separate entry-screen IA task if the product owner wants a full first-screen redesign.
Keep future ideas constrained by real-coordinate anchoring, owner sovereignty, and SillyTavern-compatible data export.
notes: Completed brainstorm plus frontend implementation children for scene-setting prose, owner opening guidance, visitor reply composer coaching, local story branch controls, character-card import/export trust polish, doorway copy-density polish, and the return-visit surface MVP. The return-visit child was validated with typecheck/build and Playwright desktop/mobile acceptance; it did not add notification delivery, social graph behavior, Schema/API/database changes, or platform-authored content. Remaining brainstorm ideas are parked as future standalone tasks.
